inputs.label: Pool Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the swimming pool in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the swimming pool in meters.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur de la piscine en mètres.

inputs.label: Number of Laps
inputs.businessContext: Total number of laps to be swum.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of laps to be swum.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de longueurs à nager.

inputs.label: Pace per 100m
inputs.businessContext: Swimmer's pace in seconds per 100 meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Swimmer's pace in seconds per 100 meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzücünün 100 metre başına saniye cinsinden temposu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Pace des Schwimmers in Sekunden pro 100 Meter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Allure du nageur en secondes par 100 mètres.

inputs.label: Rest Between Laps
inputs.businessContext: Rest time in seconds taken after each lap (except the last).

businessContext_i18n.en: Rest time in seconds taken after each lap (except the last).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her turdan sonra alınan dinlenme süresi (son tur hariç) (saniye).
businessContext_i18n.de: Pausenzeit in Sekunden nach jeder Bahn (außer der letzten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de repos en secondes après chaque longueur (sauf la dernière).
